category_sources: Official moved page points to the GitHub project for dylibbundler/macdylibbundler.
source_facts.description: "Utility to bundle libraries into executables for macOS".
display_name_sources: Official project URL uses macdylibbundler and the executable/formula name is dylibbundler.
docs_sources: Former official SourceForge page says dylibbundler has moved to GitHub.
Official GitHub README is the best available documentation surface for usage and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/auriamg/macdylibbundler; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official project naming and README cover dylib bundling use.
source_facts.description identifies macOS executable library bundling.
